name: Alexei and Dimitri Alt.
description:
You didn't realize you had some cute tiger demihuman neighbors, and they didn't realize you were their either, and golly... they think you're adorable.

┊Warnings/Contains┊

ミ☆ Demihuman antics

ミ☆ "I want two boyfriends! And I want those boyfriends to be boyfriends!"

ミ☆ First Meeting Alt!

ミ☆ Ai generated Russian. Might come up, might not.

ミ☆ User can be Demihuman or Human

Comm for Torrin on Ko-Fi! Sorry this took so long! With the holidays, my motivation would go from a 100 to a 0 in like, an hour. I love these boys, and I hope this bot shows how cute they are.
